---
title: "Exercise 4 — Branching, Merging & .gitignore"
format: html
---

**Module 3 | ~40 minutes**

---

## Goal

Create branches, work in isolation, merge, resolve a conflict, and ignore files.

---

## Part A — Create a branch

```bash
cd ~/Downloads/YOUR_USERNAME

git branch                       # which branch are you on?
git checkout -b YOUR_FIRST_NAME  # create and switch
git branch                       # confirm
```

---

## Part B — Make changes on the branch

```bash
nano test.md    # write your favorite color and one fun fact
git add test.md
git commit -m "added test file with favorite color"
git log --oneline
```

---

## Part C — Merge back to main

```bash
git checkout main
ls              # test.md is NOT here

git merge YOUR_FIRST_NAME
ls              # test.md IS here now

git log --oneline
git branch -d YOUR_FIRST_NAME    # clean up
```

---

## Part D — Simulate a merge conflict

```bash
git checkout -b experiment
nano README.md     # change the first heading to something new
git add README.md
git commit -m "changed heading on experiment branch"

git checkout main
nano README.md     # change the SAME heading to something different
git add README.md
git commit -m "changed heading on main"

git merge experiment    # CONFLICT
```

Open the file and find the conflict markers:

```
<<<<<<< HEAD
# My version on main
=======
# My version on experiment
>>>>>>> experiment
```

Edit to keep the version you want. Remove all marker lines, then:

```bash
git add README.md
git commit -m "resolved merge conflict in README heading"
```

---

## Part E — .gitignore

```bash
mkdir temp_data
touch temp_data/run1.log temp_data/run2.log temp_data/results.csv
git status     # git sees all these files
```

Create `.gitignore`:

```bash
nano .gitignore
```

Add:

```
temp_data/
*.log
```

```bash
git status     # ignored files no longer appear
git add .gitignore
git commit -m "added gitignore for temp data"
```

---

## What you learned

| Command | What it does |
|---------|-------------|
| `git branch` | List branches |
| `git checkout -b <name>` | Create and switch |
| `git merge <branch>` | Merge into current branch |
| resolve + `git add` + `git commit` | Fix a conflict |
| `.gitignore` | Exclude files from tracking |
